title: lactuca canadensis f. spinulosa
intro: Lactuca canadensis f. spinulosa, also known as Canadian prickly lettuce or prickly lettuce, is a subspecies of the Lactuca canadensis plant, a flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which may help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The leaves and stems of Lactuca canadensis f. spinulosa can be prepared as herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
